Hero.subtitle: Beteseb is a sacred, secure matrimonial bridge built specifically for Ethiopians and the global Diaspora. Blending centuries of traditional matchmaking logic with advanced modern security, we guide serious individuals toward lifelong marriage and family building.

aiMatch.title: AI Face & Live Selfie Match
aiMatch.desc: Every member completes a 3-second live video selfie verification. Our advanced AI matches it against official documents to eliminate fake profiles, bots, and impersonators, ensuring you only interact with real people.

idVerify.title: Strict Government ID Verification
idVerify.desc: To ensure maximum safety, members can verify their identity using official passports or national IDs (Gold Badge). While onboarding allows skipping this step, verified accounts receive a massive recommendation boost.

expert.title: Abushakir Astrological Wisdom
expert.desc: We integrate traditional Ethiopian calendar logic and compatibility calculations (Abushakir wisdom) without requiring birth hours, aligning you with candidates who share your values, heritage, and lifecycle timing.

guardian.title: Family & Guardian Integration
guardian.desc: Matrimony is a union of families. Beteseb allows you to invite a parent, sibling, clergy member, or elder (Wali) to act as your Profile Endorser, adding cultural integrity without exposing your private chats.

vouching.title: Community Vouching & Endorsements
vouching.desc: Earn a Platinum Badge by having trusted friends or community leaders vouch for your serious matrimonial intent. This peer-validation system ensures high-trust interactions and absolute peace of mind.

privacy.title: Your Privacy is Our Honor
privacy.desc: We hold your privacy in the highest regard. Our system implements anti-capture controls: screenshot and screen-recording blocking on Android, and automatic UI masking on iOS. We collect zero background location data and never sell your personal information. App locking options are fully voluntary and placed under your control.
privacy.item1: Android screenshot protection & iOS screen masking
privacy.item2: Zero background location tracking & zero third-party data sales
privacy.item3: Strict 18+ age verification with dual-calendar engine
privacy.item4: Fully optional app-level security lock under your control

values.title: Respect & Cultural Integrity
values.desc: We reject casual swiping. Our platform enforces relationship progression metrics to encourage meaningful dialogue. Our AI moderately scans interactions for romance scams and romance fraud, ensuring a respectful space.

CTA.message: Your Family is Waiting. Start Your 7-Day Free Trial.
CTA.subtext: Access the matrimonial platform designed for the global Habesha community. Experience strict 18+ age verification, robust encryption, and transparent marketplace guarantees.

Vision.title: Preserving Family In a Digital World.
Vision.subtitle: At the heart of the Beteseb vision lies the Abushakir wisdom. We blend centuries of traditional Ethiopian matchmaking logic with modern behavioral encryption to create verified, sacred unions across the global Diaspora.

modal.currencyNote: We use your location to provide a tailored experience and protect your privacy.

hero.title2: Love through Knowledge, Marriage through Wisdom!
hero.subtitle: Marriage is not achieved by chance, but is a chapter of life built with knowledge and care. Marriage is like a beautiful garden; if it is not cultivated and watered, it will not flourish. True love is not just a feeling, but a decision that is renewed every day. On this table, we have prepared for you the wisdom of the ages, from the art of choosing a life partner to building a strong family that is not overcome by storms, in a modern way.

class1.title: Soulmate Selection
class1.desc: The wisdom of identifying identity beyond looks and truth beyond words.

class2.title: Heart Language
class2.desc: The art of creating peace in conflict and understanding in silence.

class3.title: Family Resilience
class3.desc: The secrets of raising children with virtue and your home with love.

counseling.title1: The foundation of your beautiful home
counseling.subtitle: This section is a wisdom warehouse prepared for our special members who understand the sacred purpose of the family and invest in knowledge today for their happy life tomorrow. We offer these special trainings including video lessons and articles selected by experts, and the authority to upload new content is reserved for 'Beteseb' admin only.

Classes.footerCTA: Start accessing these tables of wisdom now by switching to special membership

Footer.description: Bringing Ethiopian families together across the globe with tradition, technology, and unconditional warmth.

About.subtitle: Beteseb is not a casual dating app. We are a high-trust, family-oriented matrimonial ecosystem built specifically to address the unique cultural and relational values of the Habesha global community.
About.missionDesc: Every process, security gate, and system feature in Beteseb is designed with the sole purpose of fostering serious, long-term matrimonial commitments. We integrate families, protect identity, and elevate trust through strict design principles.
About.value1Desc: Combining the traditional Abushakir matchmaking logic with modern behavioral models, we match candidates by shared values, heritage, and goals.
About.value2Desc: Through a structured Trust Ladder (Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Diamond badges), we ensure that fake profiles are weeded out and genuine members are highlighted.
About.value3Desc: We prevent screenshot capture on Android and mask screens on iOS. We store no background location data. Your privacy is our honor.

badges.title: The Beteseb Trust Ladder
badges.subtitle: Five Distinct Levels of Trust Badges
badges.description: Members progress through verification stages to earn unique profile badges and boost recommendation visibility.

level0.title: Bronze Badge
level0.desc: Basic registration completed. View-only access, cannot exchange messages.

level1.title: Silver Badge
level1.desc: Signed in via Google/Apple or verified email/phone plus completed a 3-second live selfie video.

level2.title: Gold Badge
level2.desc: Verified with official government ID or passport (can be skipped during onboarding).

level3.title: Platinum Badge
level3.desc: ID-verified member who has been vouched for by other high-trust members of the community.

level4.title: Diamond Badge
level4.desc: Fully verified active premium subscriber or linked with a family elder/guardian.

CommunityHub.title: Community Hub
CommunityHub.subtitle: The Digital Room
CommunityHub.description: Man is the medicine for man! 'Community Hub' is our common digital room where heart ideas are refined like gold, and knowledge is combined with experience. Here, you freely share everything you feel about marriage, child-rearing, and family building; here, no one is alone!

Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.subtitle: The Bridge of Trust
Contact.description: We are always close to you! Do you have a question, suggestion, or complaint? 'Beteseb' is always ready to hear your voice. We welcome you with a smile via phone, email, our modern AI chatbot, or at our headquarters in London.

Terms.title: Family Membership Guidelines
Terms.content: 'Beteseb' is a bridge to marriage, not just a casual connection. Therefore, by joining the platform, you promise to prioritize truth, honor, and the sacred purpose of marriage. Each member has an obligation to reveal their true identity, respect the privacy of others, and use the platform only for its intended good purpose in both speech and action. When using the 'Beteseb' marriage platform, you promise to respect rules based on cultural and moral values. In accordance with our promise to protect your dignity and build a clean community, we reserve the full right to suspend users who do not follow the rules.

Privacy.title: Your information is in safe hands
Privacy.content: Your privacy is our priority. At 'Beteseb', all your personal data, photos, and documents are protected with modern security. We never share your data without your consent. IDs are only for verification and kept strictly confidential.
